utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items requested in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 6 named items. Now check completeness per item: 
- destination: Provided (Prague, Czech Republic) — complete.
- travel_dates: Provided (August 10-14, 2024) — specific dates but note it’s 5 days stated elsewhere while dates span 5 days if inclusive? August 10-14 is 5 days if counting 10,11,12,13,14 as 5 days; accommodation lists 5 nights which would imply Aug 9–14 or Aug 10–15; slight inconsistency, but dates themselves are specified — acceptable for coverage.
- transportation: Flight details include airline, class, departure airport, date, times, arrival date/time, and cost — complete (though airline seems generic and times “approximate,” still details and cost present).
- accommodation: Hotel name, nights, and cost — provided; lacks exact dates and address but format only asks for hotel selection with costs — acceptable.
- activities: List of activities with individual costs — provided; sufficient per format.
- additional_services: Food budget with rationale and cost — provided; fits “any extra services with costs.”
- total_budget: Provided as a single figure (€675) but lacks a full itemized breakdown reconciliation; however individual line items exist above, and the total is stated — acceptable as “complete cost breakdown” in sum form.
All 6 items appear and are sufficiently specified per the given format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item in the final package to the corresponding ground-truth rating.
